name: Shrimp Pizza Wedges
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese (4-ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until shrimp turns pink. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
2. Chill the shrimp mixture.
3. Peel and devein the shrimp.
4. Combine shrimp, lemon juice, and chill for 30 minutes.
5. Position knife blade in food processor bowl; add chilled shrimp mixture, cream cheese, and next ingredients (cilantro, cumin, chili powder).
6. Process until smooth, scraping sides occasionally.
7. Place tortillas on baking sheets; spread about 1/4 cup of the shrimp mixture on each tortilla.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes or until edges begin to brown.
9. Cut each into 8 wedges. Garnish with whole shrimp or fresh cilantro sprigs if desired.
